body_txt: So, you have collectible Mons and might even want to catch them all ? But there is only one or maybe two that take all the spotlight from all the others or hang around with you the most? Is the bond between you and one particular mon stronger than with any of your other mons? Congratulations, you have a Signature Mon. Signature mons are often one of the most iconic character traits of their human. Their relationship might get a lot of focus. Maybe they symbolize their strength, personality or dreams. For villains, they may symbolize their power and usually appear as their final trump card. To qualify as a Signature Mon, most or all of the following should apply: See also Mons as Characterization , which signature mons are much more likely to fit than other mons. Compare Series Mascot , if a mon happens to be the symbol of an entire franchise.
